questions.question: Describe the basic definition of Artificial Intelligence (AI) as per the textbook. What does this term imply about the capabilities of AI systems?
questions.hint: Focus on the core concept of AI

questions.question: What is the primary difference between a 'machine' and an 'agent' according to the textbook? Provide an example to illustrate your answer.
questions.hint: Use a simple example to clarify the concept

questions.question: Explain the concept of an 'intelligent agent' and its significance in the context of Artificial Intelligence. Use specific details from the textbook to support your answer.
questions.hint: Focus on the core characteristics of intelligent agents
